build.beforeBuildCommand: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'),path=require('node:path'),child=require('node:child_process');const cwd=['.','frontend','../frontend'].find(candidate=>fs.existsSync(path.join(candidate,'package.json'))&&fs.existsSync(path.join(candidate,'build.mjs')));if(!cwd)throw new Error('DOM Wallet frontend directory not found');const result=child.spawnSync(process.platform==='win32'?'npm.cmd':'npm',['run','build'],{cwd,stdio:'inherit'});process.exit(result.status??1)"
